Prediction: No

Reasoning: The current visit record primarily details diagnoses related to severe liver disease (Alcoholic cirrhosis, Chronic viral hepatitis B/C, Hepatic infarction, Varices, Thrombocytopenia) and associated gastrointestinal issues (Blood in stool, Acute posthemorrhagic anemia). There is no explicit mention of lipid abnormalities, hypercholesterolemia, or hyperlipidemia in the current diagnoses or management plan. While the patient has multiple comorbidities, the evidence required to explicitly predict a future diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" is absent.
